gate_approach: Single representative guide; full rollout contingent on gate pass

guide.degree_title: Bachelor of Science, Science Education (Secondary Biological Science)

structural_notes: BSSESB uses 2-column multiline SP format (no Term) — identical to education_ba teacher-licensure guides (BAELED, BASPEE, BASPMM). No new handler needed.
education_bs is an undergraduate family (B.S. degree). SP has no Term column, matching education_ba bachelor's teacher programs.
Clinical Experiences and Student Teaching appear as AoS group labels — same structural pattern as education_ba. Fully handled.
Header-line metadata format (page_count=0 cosmetic gap — pre-existing behavior).
41 courses is a large undergraduate guide but the parser handles it identically to smaller guides.
Subject-specific content group ('Biology Content', 'General Science Content') — structure differs from Elementary (BAELED) but AoS state machine handles it without changes.
AoS has 11 groups — largest group count yet in an education family guide, but parser handles it cleanly.
gate_result: PASS — BSSESB HIGH confidence, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings. 41/41 perfect reconciliation.

recommendation.notes: BSSESB is a textbook extension of validated education_ba patterns. 2-column SP, Clinical Experiences, Student Teaching — all pre-validated. 4-guide family with predictable structure. Recommend rolling out education_bs before teaching_mat: smaller family, faster to complete, no structural unknowns. Other education_bs guides are likely subject variants (different science discipline, possibly different subject areas) but core structure should be identical.
